title: Session 13 — The Final Stretch
bodyText:
**TL;DR: Trunks died saving the party — vial-detonation vs. the horned assassin; Felson died for a breath and Varen's divine rewind pulled him back; Varen dismembered the hunter.**

# What happened
- [[pc-brolin|Brolin]] dreamed of a net-weaving figure of **[[gond]]**: *"Good deeds done with ill intentions are no good deeds... we will help you this day — but for the last time."* He dismissed it.
- [[session-11|Following the vines]] into a massive cavern: a **severed, tattooed arm** — and [[pc-trunks|Trunks]]' curled body, which rose and **transformed into a half-dwarf, half-shadow monstrosity**.
- The **horned figure** ([[the-assassin]]) made [[pc-varen|Varen]] a final offer, was refused — battle. It tore the coverings from Varen's hand and named him **traitor**; Trunks flickered between self-control and attacking his friends.
- At the brink, **Trunks drank every vial at once** — an **anti-magic explosion** that disintegrated him and downed most of the party.
- [[pc-felson|Felson]], choking on blood, took what seemed his last breath — and **Varen's divine magic rewrote the last moments**, bringing him back (Eilistraee's hand, in hindsight — [[thread-varens-mark]]).
- The party defeated the horned figure; Varen **dismembered it with the shadowed sword** ([[velmir|Velmir]]).

# Fired / left smoking
- [x] The horned hunter is dead — but he was only the first of [[the-eight-legs]].
- [x] Gond's "last time" — his final open intervention ([[gond]]).
- Varen's rewind: where did burn-the-past divine intervention come from? (→ resolved: [[eilistraee]].)

# Threads
[[pc-trunks]] · [[the-assassin]] · [[thread-varens-mark]] · [[velmir]]
